page.title: A Closer Look at Quinfall
page.description: In-game captures and a community-built interactive map — explore, filter and share, all on one page.

grid.title: Scenes & Moments
grid.subtitle: Quinfall's vistas, undersea world, mining and dungeon moments

manzara.title: Open-World Vista
manzara.body: Quinfall's breathtaking valleys, forests and distant horizons — a living world you can ride through for hours.

doga.title: Heart of the Wild
doga.body: Lush forests, running streams and sunlight filtering through the canopy — the calm side of Quinfall.

dungeon.title: Into the Dungeon
dungeon.body: Dim corridors, cursed halls and elite mobs — dive in with your party for the loot.

maden.title: The Mine
maden.body: The heart of gathering: ore veins, quarries and rare resources fuel every craft in the world.

toplayicilik.title: Harvest Time
toplayicilik.body: Hemp grows wild across the world — its fibre is spun into thread, the very first link in the chain that leads to tailoring.

suAlti.title: Beneath the Waves
suAlti.body: Glowing ruins, schools of fish and dive sites — the hidden side of Quinfall's sailing system.

manzara2.title: Valley of Silence
manzara2.body: Mist over the hills, deep forest canopy and distant mountains — another face of the world.

manzara3.title: First Light
manzara3.body: Valleys gilded by the rising sun and a world waking up — the prettiest hour to explore.

walking.title: On the Road
walking.body: A character, a sword on the shoulder, a goal in mind — the journey is the story Quinfall tells you.

kasaba.title: Heart of the Town
kasaba.body: The hum of the marketplace, the ring of the forge, travelling traders — towns are the social hubs.

tarim.title: Field Work
tarim.body: Grow grain, vegetables and specialty crops on your own land — the backbone of cooking and trade income.

fishing.title: Quiet Waters
fishing.body: A line cast by the river — fish species, rare relics and a moment of stillness.

denizcilik.title: Open Sea
denizcilik.body: Sails full, the horizon ahead — where trade, piracy and naval war begin.

denizcilik2.title: Approaching Harbor
denizcilik2.body: Cargo ships easing toward the docks and crowded piers — the hub of the sailing system.

zirhliAt.title: Armored Cavalry
zirhliAt.body: A fully barded warhorse and its rider — the fastest, most striking entry to the battlefield.

build.title: Building a Home
build.body: Your own land, your own house — every brick is your signature in Quinfall's housing system.

build2.title: The Workbenches
build2.body: Forge, loom, carpenter's bench — production buildings are the craftsman's home.

map.title: Community Map
map.subtitle: Resource nodes, creatures, bosses, cities and farming routes

frame.fallbackBody: Your browser blocked the embedded view. Use the button below to open the map in a new tab.
